name: VS Code Extensions
description: Offline VS Code extension pack for C++ development — C/C++, TestMate, Python, and more. VS Code must be installed with 'code' on PATH.

extensions.name: C/C++ Extension Pack
extensions.description: Complete C/C++ IDE support — IntelliSense, debug, code navigation

extensions.name: C++ TestMate
extensions.description: Catch2 / GTest / doctest test explorer and runner

extensions.name: CMake Tools
extensions.description: Full CMake integration — configure, build, debug from VS Code

extensions.name: Doxygen Doc Generator
extensions.description: Auto-generate Doxygen comment blocks from function signatures

extensions.name: Live Preview
extensions.description: Local HTTP server for in-editor browser preview
